prompt: Create a solution spec: A Platform ThatAI. Target user: Remote hiring manager at a tech company. Solution: A platform that connects companies with pre-vetted, remote intermediate full stack engineers. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription

Create a solution spec: A Software ThatAI. Target user: CEO or founder of a remote startup with a growing team. Solution: A software that helps companies design, implement, and manage transparent salary structures for their remote teams. Revenue model: Monthly SaaS subscription
